mapper.select:
SELECT SYS_ID, CMM_CD, CMM_DTL_CD, CMM_DTL_SEQ, CMM_DTL_NM, SRT, ETC_CD1, ETC_CD2, ETC_CD3, ETC_CD4, ETC_CD5, ETC_CD1_AMT, RGSTR_ID, [dbo].FN_FS_GETSNAME1('1',RGSTR_ID) as RGSTR_NAME , RGSTR_DT, MDFR_ID, [dbo].FN_FS_GETSNAME1('1', MDFR_ID) as MDFR_NAME , MDFR_DT, SSMM, STATUS, 'S' AS GRID_STATS
FROM [CESCOFS].[dbo].[TB_FS_COMM_DTL] WITH (NOLOCK)
WHERE CMM_CD = #{cmm_cd} ORDER BY SRT

SELECT SYS_ID, CMM_CD, UP_CMM_CD, REF_CMM_CD, CMM_NM, CMM_DESC, STATUS, RGSTR_ID, RGSTR_DT, MDFR_ID, MDFR_DT FROM [CESCOFS].[dbo].[TB_FS_COMM] WHERE 1 = 1
AND CMM_CD LIKE '%' + #{cmm_cd} + '%'
AND CMM_NM LIKE '%' + #{cmm_nm} + '%'
AND STATUS = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO [CESCOFS].[dbo].[TB_FS_COMM] ( SYS_ID, CMM_CD, UP_CMM_CD, CMM_NM, CMM_DESC, STATUS, RGSTR_ID, RGSTR_DT, MDFR_ID, MDFR_DT ) VALUES ( #{sys_id}, #{cmm_cd}, #{up_cmm_cd}, #{cmm_nm}, #{cmm_desc}, #{status}, #{rgstr_id}, GETDATE(), #{mdfr_id}, GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE [CESCOFS].[dbo].[TB_FS_COMM] SET UP_CMM_CD = #{up_cmm_cd}, CMM_NM = #{cmm_nm}, CMM_DESC = #{cmm_desc}, STATUS = #{status}, MDFR_ID= #{mdfr_id}, MDFR_DT = GETDATE() WHERE SYS_ID = #{sys_id} AND CMM_CD = #{cmm_cd}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO [CESCOFS].[dbo].[TB_FS_COMM_DTL] ( SYS_ID, CMM_CD, CMM_DTL_CD, CMM_DTL_NM, SRT, ETC_CD1, ETC_CD2, ETC_CD3, ETC_CD4, ETC_CD5, ETC_CD1_AMT, STATUS, RGSTR_ID, RGSTR_DT, MDFR_ID, MDFR_DT,SSMM ) VALUES ( #{sys_id}, #{cmm_cd}, #{cmm_dtl_cd}, #{cmm_dtl_nm}, #{srt}, #{etc_cd1}, #{etc_cd2}, #{etc_cd3}, #{etc_cd4}, #{etc_cd5}, #{etc_cd1_amt}, #{status}, #{rgstr_id}, GETDATE(), #{mdfr_id}, GETDATE(),#{ssmm} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE [CESCOFS].[dbo].[TB_FS_COMM_DTL] SET SYS_ID = #{sys_id}, CMM_CD = #{cmm_cd} , CMM_DTL_CD = #{cmm_dtl_cd} , CMM_DTL_NM = #{cmm_dtl_nm} , SRT = #{srt} , ETC_CD1 = #{etc_cd1}, ETC_CD2 = #{etc_cd2}, ETC_CD3 = #{etc_cd3}, ETC_CD4 = #{etc_cd4}, ETC_CD5 = #{etc_cd5}, ETC_CD1_AMT = #{etc_cd1_amt}, STATUS = #{status}, MDFR_ID = #{mdfr_id}, MDFR_DT = GETDATE(), SSMM = #{ssmm}
WHERE CMM_DTL_SEQ = #{cmm_dtl_seq}
